description: A flight is about to close, but a few passengers have not yet appeared at the gate. The agent must make a final call.

nodes.task_description: Check the system to see which passengers have checked in but not yet boarded.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies three passengers who are missing.

nodes.task_description: Make a final boarding announcement over the PA system, calling the missing passengers by name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes a clear final call.

nodes.task_description: If the passengers do not appear after a set time, offload their bags (if any) and close the flight.

expected_outcome.value: The passengers do not arrive. Agent coordinates with baggage handlers to offload their bags and closes the flight.
